titleStmt.title: SII 16.127: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 127. (A.R. No. 481 of 1906.) GŌPAVARAM, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a mutilated slab set up in the middle of the village.
This is dated in Śaka 1464, Śubhakṛit, Kārtika śu. 12, corresponding to 1542 A.D., October 20, (Friday).

It records a gift of land in Gōpavaram alias Śaṭhagōpapuram to Nārāyaṇayyaṅgāru of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha, by Appaṅgāru, son of Kandāḷa Dēvarājāchārya of Vādhūla-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha. The village Gōpavaram which is said to have been obtained as a gift by the donor from the king was situated in Rāmēśvaram-Podaṭūru of Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma in Udayagiri-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . śrīmatē rāmānujāya
namaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1464 Agunanēṭi śubhakṛt saṁvatsara kā¨rtti
kka śu 12 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvī
ra sadāśivarāyamahārāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁ
du vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍagā
nu . śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ . śrīmadvēdamā¨rgapra
tiṣṭhācāryavēdāṁtācāryulaina vādhūlagōtra Āpasta
ṁbhasūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina karaddāḷa dēvarājācāryula
komāruṁḍu Appaṁgāru kāsyapagōtra Āpastaṁbba
sūtra yajuśākhādhyāyulaina janyaṁ Aṁnayagā
ri komāruṁḍu nārāyaṇayyagārikiccina bhūdāna dha
¨rmmaśāsanakrama meṭlaṁnanu mākunu sadāśivarāyamahārāya
lu vuddagirirājyaṁ gaṁḍikōṭaśīmalōni rāmēśvaraṁ poduṭūrilō
ni tāṁmraśāsanasahitaṁgānu dāravōśi Iccina gōpavaragrāmāna
ku pratināmamaina śaṭhagōpapuramaṁdu mīku sarvamāṁnyaṁgādhāravōśi I
stimi śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ śrīmadvēdamā¨rga pratiṣṭhāpanācārya
Āpastaṁbhasūtra yajuśākhādhyāyulaina
komāruṁḍu nārāya
Digital edition of SII 16.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
